content: agent1: Implementing 'Remove Temperature Modulation; Add Deterministic Prompt Cache Salt' feature in dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py. Will remove temperature epsilon modulation and add _cache_salt() method + cache_salt InputField to GenerateModuleInstruction/DescribeProgram/DescribeModule signatures. Let me know if you're touching this file too.

agent1: Thanks for the heads up. My changes don't touch __init__ params or tip selection logic - I'm editing propose_instruction_for_predictor (removing temp modulation), adding a new _cache_salt() method to GroundedProposer, and adding cache_salt fields to DescribeProgram/DescribeModule/generate_instruction_class signatures + GenerateModuleInstruction.forward. Should be non-overlapping with your tip_weights work.

agent1: done - removed temperature modulation, added _cache_salt() to GroundedProposer, added cache_salt InputField to DescribeProgram/DescribeModule/GenerateSingleModuleInstruction, wired it through propose_instruction_for_predictor and GenerateModuleInstruction.forward. Tests pass (tests/propose/test_grounded_proposer.py). patch.txt written.
